case_title: MICHELLE BROUGHTON VS. COX DENTAL CORPORATION ET AL

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROUGHTON, MICHELLE AS TO DEFENDANT MUZIKAR DDS, KARL

PROOF OF SERVICE OF SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUE ORDER OF JULY 16TH, 2020. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROUGHTON, MICHELLE SERVED JUL-24-2020, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT KIM DDS, PAUL
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **DENIED** UNTIMELY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-21-2021 - CONTINUED ON THE COURTS OWN MOTION TO JUL-15-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506, TO ALLOW DEFENDANTS PAUL KIM, DDS AND COX DENTAL CORPORATION TO SUBMIT TIMELY FILED REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM AND TO SUBMIT DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE TO THE COURT. PLAINTIFF MICHELLE BROUGHTON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT COX DENTAL CORPORATION, REPRESENTED BY CARLA R. ULLOA, PRACTICE MANAGER AND KERRI ROSS, DIRECTOR OF OPERATIONS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PAUL KIM, DDS IS PRESENT BY ZOOM. DR. KIM'S REQUEST TO APPEAR BY ZOOM FILED ON 4-19-21 WAS DENIED AS UNTIMELY. THE HEARING WAS CONTINUED TO ALLOW PARTIES TO TIMELY SUBMIT AND FILE A REQUEST FOR ZOOM APPEARANCE AND TO SUBMIT DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE TO THE COURT AND TO PLAINTIFF. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROUGHTON, MICHELLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COX DENTAL CORPORATION $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,120.00, **SEE ATTACHED MC-025** STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
